repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1 Theorem 1: fixed-overlap DML calibration/equivalence corner

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML: equal K-fold cross-fitted DML asymptotic linearity; https://academic.oup.com/ectj/article/21/1/C1/5056401

repo_prior_art.cite: Closest repo entries eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1/v2 and eid_dml_orthogonality_frontier_v1 study weak-overlap/studentization/Riesz frontiers, not fold-mass spectra

published_prior_art.cite: Velez2024DMLGrowingK and ChenSyrgkanisAustern2022NoSplitDML cover growing-K DML1/DML2 and no-splitting stability endpoints, but not an unequal-fold mass certificate; https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.01864 ; https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper_files/paper/2022/hash/1498a03a04f9bcd3a7d44058fc5dc639-Abstract-Conference.html
AhrensHansenSchafferWiemann2024DDML exposes custom folds and fold-frequency tables but does not prove this variance-separation theorem; https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/1536867X241233641

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The comparator table promises strict tightening of Velez2024DMLGrowingK and equivalence with ChenSyrgkanisAustern2022NoSplitDML, but the §8 headline is a standalone Gamma_n trichotomy rather than a named-paper tightening/equivalence frontier.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The comparator table promises non-representability against AhrensHansenSchafferWiemann2024DDML, but §8 states a generic variance-report witness and never phrases a non-representability result for ddml's foldvar/tabfold workflow.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Gamma_n is advertised as a computable fold-spectrum certificate, but §9 only plugs in assumed R_{k,n} error envelopes; it does not compute the certificate from observed primitives or a worked learner/law.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The open-class boundary claim has no concrete non-corner DGP with explicit nuisance learners and fold errors; Exhibit 9.1 is only a symbolic mass/error-rate substitution.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: With n a_n -> lambda and fold-two perturbations having O(1) nonzero variance, the root-n contribution of the vanishing evaluation fold has variance m_{2,n}/n = a_n -> 0, so Exhibit 9.2 cannot yield the claimed non-degenerate Z_lambda additive variance.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption witness controls the nuisance learner trained on the large complement for fold two, but Conjecture 2 needs fold-one remainders controlled as well; otherwise the large evaluation fold trained on a bounded complement dominates.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The setup locks deterministic triangular-array partitions, but Conjecture 1(i) introduces an undefined design effect for random and repeated folds.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the Conjecture 2 witness with a concrete finite-support triangular-array DGP and explicitly compute the scaled variance contribution; if the intended obstruction is the large fold trained on a tiny complement, state that instead of attributing Z_lambda to the vanishing evaluation fold.
Make Gamma_n either an oracle diagnostic or replace R_{k,n} with an observable upper-bound certificate; then recompute Exhibit 9.1 from observed primitives and learner outputs.

Rewrite the flagship comparator claim as a strict named frontier: specify exactly how the Gamma_n condition tightens ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML, how it relates iff to ChenSyrgkanisAustern2022NoSplitDML at the endpoint, and what ddml report is non-represented.
Add one non-corner worked witness with named law, fold masses, learner error process, Gamma_n value, and internal variance check before re-asking for flagship tier.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version; redraft the witness and computability/comparator frontiers before another Stage -0.5 pass.
